# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge
We pledge to make participation in Micrasolutions projects a harassment-free experience
for everyone, regardless of background, identity, or experience level.

## Our standards
Positive behaviour:
- Being respectful of differing viewpoints
- Giving and gracefully accepting constructive feedback
- Focusing on what's best for the community

Unacceptable behaviour:
- Harassment, insults, or derogatory comments
- Publishing others' private information
- Any conduct that would be inappropriate in a professional setting

## Enforcement
Instances of abusive behaviour may be reported to **conduct@micrasolutions.com**. All
reports are reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly. Maintainers may remove
comments, commits, code, and contributions that violate this code, and may ban
contributors for behaviour they deem inappropriate.

## Attribution
Adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), v2.1.
